user.title: Skydark Family Calendar
user.description: Configure your family calendar. You can link Google and Microsoft calendars later in Settings.

data_description.family_name: Display name for your family (e.g. "The Millers").
data_description.weather_entity: Home Assistant weather entity to show in the header.
Home Assistant weather entity to show in the header.

add_points.name: Add points
add_points.description: Award points to a family member.

redeem_reward.name: Redeem reward
redeem_reward.description: Deduct points and redeem a reward for a family member.

create_list.name: Create list
create_list.description: Create a new list (e.g. grocery, to-do).

add_list_item.name: Add list item
add_list_item.description: Add an item to a list.

delete_list.name: Delete list
delete_list.description: Delete a list and all of its items.

delete_list_item.name: Delete list item
delete_list_item.description: Remove a single item from a list.

add_meal_recipe.name: Add meal recipe
add_meal_recipe.description: Add a meal recipe with optional ingredients.

upload_photo.name: Upload photo
upload_photo.description: Register a photo (file must already exist at file_path within config directory).

send_notification.name: Send notification
send_notification.description: Show a notification on the Skydark display.
